name: Destructure Two Levels Capture
description: Outer:{inner(Inner:{x(a)})} — nested destructure two levels deep with captures. UNCERTAIN: bracketing here may parse as Pattern(Identifier(inner), …) because parens after identifier produce inline-pattern? Actually inner(...) here is a capture-paren (inner followed by glued paren), so Identifier(inner,Inner:{x(a)}) is not valid because capture must be an identifier. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: the cleanest reading remains via inline pattern.
